# NPM script execution policy error (2026-03-16 14:32Z)

_**User (2026-03-16 14:32Z)**_

 C:\Users\sk5091540\OneDrive - Stavanger kommune\code\mycv\tools\HackMyResume> npm audit fix
npm : File C:\Users\sk5091540\AppData\Local\Programs\Node\npm.ps1 cannot be loaded. The file C
:\Users\sk5091540\AppData\Local\Programs\Node\npm.ps1 is not digitally signed. You cannot run  
this script on the current system. For more information about running scripts and setting exec 
ution policy, see about_Execution_Policies at https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=135170.   

---

_**Agent (model copilot/auto)**_

The error occurs because PowerShell's execution policy is blocking unsigned scripts, including npm.ps1. To resolve this, you can temporarily change the execution policy for the current session.

Run this command in your PowerShell terminal before running npm commands:

Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope Process -ExecutionPolicy Bypass

This will allow unsigned scripts to run for the current session only. After running this, try your npm audit fix command again.
